analysis: The current project has a basic structure for a website about black holes, but it lacks the specific UI and theme improvements requested. The HTML file needs to be completed with sections related to black holes, including animated slides and interactive elements. The CSS file requires updates to include a dark, cosmic theme with animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The JavaScript file needs to be updated with event handlers and functionality for the new buttons and interactive features.

improvements.description: Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes.
Complete the CSS file with the full intended dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements.

Update the JavaScript content to ensure all buttons have proper event handlers and functionality, including the mobile menu toggle functionality with proper event handling, smooth transitions, and user-friendly interactions.
